hi there,

so i ordered the blue jacket in size L (order #48213, placed 2/24) and it
came in M instead?? not sure if that's on your end or the warehouse but i
just want to return it and get the right size or my money back tbh,
whichever is faster. can you send me a shipping label or do i need to
print my own

thanks
sarah

------- forwarded message -------
From: dave.ops@northwind-retail.example
To: sarah.k@northwind-retail.example
Subject: RE: RE: Order #48213 - wrong size, want to send back
Date: Mon, 3 Mar 2025 11:02

Hi Sarah,

Sorry about that! I've logged the return in our RMA sheet and emailed you
a prepaid label (check your inbox, subject "Your return label"). Once you
drop it at any UPS location we'll get an alert and Priya on the warehouse
team will inspect it when it arrives.

If it checks out (tags on, unworn) we'll either ship the size L right away
or refund you, whichever you picked below in the return form. If for some
reason the item comes back damaged or worn, our policy says we can't
restock it and we'd have to deny the return / refund -- that's rare but it
happens maybe 1 in 20 times, usually customer just didn't read the "final
sale if worn" note.

Also fyi -- we use our Shopify order data (in "Order Mgmt System") to look
up your original order, and log everything about the return itself in a
separate return request spreadsheet ("Returns Tracker") since our RMA flow
isn't in Shopify natively.

- Dave, Ops
